name: Mogul Energy International, Inc.
summary: Mogul Energy International, Inc. operates as an oil and gas exploration and development company. It operates the Stafford prospect located in Jackson County, Texas; the Alkek prospect situated in Goliad County, Texas; and the East Mathis prospect located in San Patricio County, Texas, as well as prospects across the Gulf Coast area of Texas. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas. On September 20, 2017, Mogul Energy International Inc. filed a voluntary petition for liquidation under Chapter 7 in the US Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of Texas.
